name: Sekolah Madania

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Raya Parung Km. 7, Telaga Kahuripan, Parung, Bogor 16310, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Sekolah Madania is the choice for families who want a more spacious, inclusive school environment away from Jakarta's congestion.
paragraphs: Parents say Sekolah Madania is the choice for families who want a more spacious, inclusive school environment away from Jakarta's congestion.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$2.5K – US$5.9K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Bogor campus with open grounds, Boarding facilities, Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities.
